posts.author: TechTroubLiam
posts.text: Has anyone else noticed their phone is draining battery faster after the latest update? I've been checking my settings and it looks like a background sync issue. Just wanted to share in case others are seeing similar glitches.
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless personal update about technology troubleshooting with no policy violations, so it should be approved. It does not spread misinformation or solicit sensitive data.

posts.author: HannahOakhaven
posts.text: Honestly, the new AI moderation filters on this app are getting a bit too aggressive. I tried to post a review for my local coffee shop in Bellmere and it kept flagging perfectly normal words like 'cafe' or 'menu' as spam. It's incredibly frustrating when you're just trying to share a genuine opinion about your day.
posts.explanation: The post expresses a valid complaint regarding platform functionality (false positives from moderation filters) without containing threats, harmful misinformation, or privacy violations. It is a harmless everyday grievance.
